overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian urban street during an orange dust storm. The character navigates past pedestrians, industrial structures, and illuminated billboards in a hazy, neon-lit environment with low visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with commercial trailer and small shop

events.description: passing large billboard trailer on the left side of the street
approaching small cylindrical building with glowing OPEN neon sign

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the dusty street, navigating around debris and approaching a small commercial structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red top and white pants walking toward the camera
pedestrian in yellow plaid shirt walking away from camera

entered.detail: large rectangular advertisement trailer with red and blue graphics and text
rounded concrete structure with glowing blue OPEN neon sign
tall palm tree visible through the orange haze

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking past a large billboard trailer on a debris-strewn street during an orange dust storm. The character approaches a small cylindrical building with a glowing OPEN sign while encountering pedestrians walking in opposing directions through the hazy atmosphere.

events.description: approaching traffic light and crosswalk at intersection
slight turn to follow the street path while navigating through pedestrian groups

agents.ego_description: crossing the street intersection, moving through groups of pedestrians heading in the same direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking alongside the camera
group of pedestrians walking ahead into the dense haze

entered.detail: tall traffic signal pole with multiple lights and pedestrian signals
large concrete industrial structure with metal railings and pipes

segments.scene_description: The character crosses an open intersection marked with crosswalk lines, passing a traffic light on the right. Industrial buildings loom on the left while groups of pedestrians walk ahead into the thick orange haze. The billboard and small building from the previous segment fall behind as the character continues forward.

events.description: entering area beneath massive industrial overpass structure
visibility decreases further as dust thickens under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking beneath massive industrial overpasses, following the flow of pedestrians through the enclosed corridor

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red and white outfit walking ahead under the overpass
pedestrian in dark jacket walking parallel to the camera

entered.detail: massive steel gantry structure with support pillars spanning across the street
large industrial exhaust pipe running vertically along the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character enters a more enclosed industrial area beneath massive steel overpasses that span the street. Large pipes run along the building walls on the left. The lighting becomes darker and more shadowed under the structures while groups of pedestrians continue walking ahead through the dusty corridor.

events.description: approaching wall with large illuminated billboards advertising weapons
slowing slightly to observe the illuminated advertisements while walking

agents.ego_description: walking along the advertisement wall, observing the large illuminated weapon billboards while following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead along the billboard wall

entered.detail: long wall covered with multiple large glowing digital advertisements
billboard showing woman aiming gun with text '2nd Amendment is not only for the rich' and Budget Arms logo

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking alongside a long wall covered in bright illuminated billboards advertising weapons. The artificial glow from the advertisements lights up the immediate area with vivid colors contrasting against the orange haze. The character continues walking past the repetitive weapon ads while following a pedestrian ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dust-choked urban street that transitions from an open, hazy intersection into a shadowed industrial corridor. It begins by moving past a large billboard trailer and a small building with a glowing open sign, navigating through pedestrians amidst a thick orange haze. As the camera crosses an open intersection marked by crosswalks and traffic lights, the environment shifts toward a more oppressive atmosphere where massive steel overpasses and large wall pipes begin to loom overhead. The scene then descends into deeper shadows beneath these structures before opening up alongside a long wall of vivid, illuminated weapon advertisements. Finally, the artificial glow of these billboards cuts through the orange dust as the camera follows a pedestrian deeper into the neon-lit industrial zone.
